allow: PowerShell($pw = kubectl --context minikube -n argocd get secret argocd-initial-admin-secret -o jsonpath="{.data.password}"; if \($pw\) { [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\([System.Convert]::FromBase64String\($pw\)\) } else { "SECRET_NOT_FOUND - password may have been rotated or namespace missing" })
